title: Sonette Maritz Audiology - Hear life to the fullest
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Every conversation, every laugh, every cherished melody - your hearing connects you to the world and the people you love.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Every conversation, every laugh, every cherished melody - your hearing connects you to the world and the people you love."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Yet hearing often goes unnoticed until it starts to fade. Maintaining your hearing health is not only about staying connected; it’s about preserving your quality of life.","html":"Yet hearing often goes unnoticed until it starts to fade. Maintaining your hearing health is not only about staying connected; it’s about preserving your quality of life."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Established in 1999, with many years of experience, we at Sonette Maritz Audiologists are dedicated to helping you rediscover the sounds you’ve been missing, because every sound matters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We were thrilled to open the Mossel Bay branch in 2024. We are also a proud member of iCAN (Independent Connected Audiology Network), promoting independent audiology practices not connected to a specific brand of hearing aids.","html":"We were thrilled to open the Mossel Bay branch in 2024. We are also a proud member of iCAN (Independent Connected Audiology Network), promoting independent audiology practices not connected to a specific brand of hearing aids."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Sonette Maritz Audiologists, we believe in a patient-centred approach, taking the time to understand your specific hearing difficulties and lifestyle. We treat our patients as unique individuals, because we know that hearing loss can be a challenge, and one needs the perfect solution for an imperfect situation.","html":"At Sonette Maritz Audiologists, we believe in a patient-centred approach, taking the time to understand your specific hearing difficulties and lifestyle. We treat our patients as unique individuals, because we know that hearing loss can be a challenge, and one needs the perfect solution for an imperfect situation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We pride ourselves on the fact that we have extensive knowledge of a range of different hearing aid brands and also provide a wide variety of hearing aid models and brands. Individual hearing needs, lifestyle and preferences should be considered in the choice of hearing amplification.","html":"We pride ourselves on the fact that we have extensive knowledge of a range of different hearing aid brands and also provide a wide variety of hearing aid models and brands. Individual hearing needs, lifestyle and preferences should be considered in the choice of hearing amplification."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hearing health is not a one-size-fits-all solution. We focus on delivering personalised care through advanced technology, an in-depth and thorough evaluation process, and a deep commitment to your overall health and well-being.","html":"Hearing health is not a one-size-fits-all solution. We focus on delivering personalised care through advanced technology, an in-depth and thorough evaluation process, and a deep commitment to your overall health and well-being."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Sonette Maritz Audiology, we offer more than just the basic hearing test. We assess your hearing abilities in quiet and noisy environments, do tinnitus assessments and rehabilitation, while also screening cognitive function using the first of its kind in SA computerised cognitive screening, the Cognivue Thrive. This combination provides a complete view of your auditory and brain health. We are dedicated to offering personalised and innovative brain-hearing solutions.","html":"At Sonette Maritz Audiology, we offer more than just the basic hearing test. We assess your hearing abilities in quiet and noisy environments, do tinnitus assessments and rehabilitation, while also screening cognitive function using the first of its kind in SA computerised cognitive screening, the Cognivue Thrive. This combination provides a complete view of your auditory and brain health. We are dedicated to offering personalised and innovative brain-hearing solutions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With our expert guidance and compassionate care, we help you take control of your health - because life is meant to be heard.","html":"With our expert guidance and compassionate care, we help you take control of your health - because life is meant to be heard."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sonette Maritz Audiologists’ nomination for the Best of Mossel Bay Award is a reflection of our passion for audiology and our dedication to our patients.","html":"Sonette Maritz Audiologists’ nomination for the Best of Mossel Bay Award is a reflection of our passion for audiology and our dedication to our patients."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Cast your vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your support inspires us to continue to improve the hearing health of the community.","html":"Your support inspires us to continue to improve the hearing health of the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Sonette Maritz Audiology - Hear life to the fullest
